matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Economics and Data Science is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The course aims to expand the knowledge of a diverse set of students who already have good undergraduate degrees in economics or related fields with the tools of data science to handle and interpret large quantities of data.
